loader.HTML:
Choose how to build

Watch: Edit with Myop Agent
1
Switch to Agent mode and describe what you want to build or change.
2
Use Visual Edit to iterate until it looks right. Restore if needed.
3
Click Connect and share it with a developer to connect it once. How to connect?
Watch: Edit with Claude + Figma
1
Link Myop MCP to Claude (Pro/Max)
2
Connect the Figma MCP to Claude. Then, Paste a Figma link.
3
When it looks right, type: "Create a new component in Myop."
4
Click Connect and share it with a developer to connect it once. How to connect?
Watch: Edit with Claude + Screenshot
1
Link Myop MCP to Claude (Pro/Max)
2
Upload a screenshot and describe the changes you want.
3
When the component looks right, type: "Create a new component in Myop."
4
Click Connect and share it with a developer to connect it once. How to connect?
Watch: Edit with Gemini
1
In Gemini, enter the prompt and add a screenshot.
2
Refine the component in Gemini. When finished, copy the generated code.
3
Open Myop, create a new component, and paste the code.
4
Click Connect and share it with a developer to connect it once. How to connect?
Watch: Build in IDE
1
Connect Myop MCP inside Claude or Cursor: docs.myop.dev/docs/mcp-setup
2
Describe what you want to build, using text or screenshots.
3
To preview, open it in your browser, iterate until it looks right.
4
When ready, type: "Create a new component in Myop."
Watch: Connect to Your App
1
Click Connect.
2
Share the link with a developer, or invite them to your workspace.
3
Developer selects host app and either runs npm install or uses a snippet.
4
For AI platforms, copy the provided connection prompt.
